eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jefferson, OR; at 8:06 PM on JUN 4, 2026 Effective until 9:06 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Level 1 - BE READY to evacuate from South of Dry Creek Trail to Mile marker 101 on Highway 26, and West of Tommie Street, and North of George Street on the Warm Springs Reservation.
